tools.name: check
tools.description: Check whether a message, URL, email, or piece of text is a scam. Returns a verdict (safe/scam/action/ignore), a plain-English summary, recommended next steps, and a confidence level.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check · Public sink: check.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check · Public sink: check

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
